mapper.insert: insert into aiw_closed_loop_run (biz_id, run_no, task_code, trigger_source, run_status, automation_level, market_scope, theme_code, mock_user_biz_id, portfolio_biz_id, report_biz_id, prompt_biz_id, prompt_code, prompt_version, backtest_biz_id, quality_score, gate_result, summary, failure_reason, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{runNo}, #{taskCode}, #{triggerSource}, #{runStatus}, #{automationLevel}, #{marketScope}, #{themeCode}, #{mockUserBizId}, #{portfolioBizId}, #{reportBizId}, #{promptBizId}, #{promptCode}, #{promptVersion}, #{backtestBizId}, #{qualityScore}, #{gateResult}, #{summary}, #{failureReason}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update run_status = values(run_status), automation_level = values(automation_level), market_scope = values(market_scope), theme_code = values(theme_code), mock_user_biz_id = values(mock_user_biz_id), portfolio_biz_id = values(portfolio_biz_id), report_biz_id = values(report_biz_id), prompt_biz_id = values(prompt_biz_id), prompt_code = values(prompt_code), prompt_version = values(prompt_version), backtest_biz_id = values(backtest_biz_id), quality_score = values(quality_score), gate_result = values(gate_result), summary = values(summary), failure_reason = values(failure_reason), completed_at = values(completed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)

insert into aiw_closed_loop_step (biz_id, run_biz_id, step_code, step_name, step_order, step_status, input_summary, output_summary, failure_reason, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{runBizId}, #{stepCode}, #{stepName}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepStatus}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{failureReason}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update step_name = values(step_name), step_order = values(step_order), step_status = values(step_status), input_summary = values(input_summary), output_summary = values(output_summary), failure_reason = values(failure_reason), started_at = values(started_at), completed_at = values(completed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)
mapper.select: select * from aiw_closed_loop_step where run_biz_id = #{runBizId} order by step_order asc
